name: layered-env-resolution
description: resolveEnv (src/secrets/env.ts) layers env values in order: defaults < host (only declared required/optional keys) < user secret store (configDir/secrets/global.env + <project>.env) < [secrets] block (literals or op:// resolved via OpResolver) < CLI overrides. An empty-string override deletes a default. Required-key gating happens last and aggregates every missing key into one SecretResolutionError. We never copy unrelated host vars — that's what envPassthrough is for on the SandboxProfile.

content: OpResolver (src/secrets/op.ts) caches by ref so repeated lookups in one [secrets] block fan out to one op spawn each. Tests inject a fake via { read: OpReadFn }; production calls 'op read <ref>'. ENOENT (op binary missing) is translated to a SecretResolutionError pointing at the install docs — never a raw spawn error.
